hero.description: I design and ship data-centric products that combine full-stack engineering, machine learning systems, and business intelligence thinking. My goal is to turn complex data into elegant, measurable software experiences.

about.summary: I’m an engineering student in Business Intelligence with a software mindset: I enjoy structuring systems, simplifying complexity, and using data to drive better product outcomes.
about.story: My work sits at the convergence of software development, machine learning, and analytics. I like building things end to end: exploring raw data, designing the architecture, training or integrating intelligent models, and delivering interfaces that feel sharp, fast, and reliable. Whether I am building an AI-powered workflow, an MLOps pipeline, or a BI reporting solution, I care deeply about maintainability, clarity, and business value.

highlights.title: Product-oriented builder
highlights.description: I focus on solutions that are both technically solid and genuinely useful for real teams, users, and decision-makers.

highlights.title: Data-to-interface mindset
highlights.description: I’m comfortable moving from SQL and analytics to APIs, frontend experiences, and deployment-ready architecture.

highlights.title: Continuous learner
highlights.description: I actively explore MLOps, applied AI, warehousing, and modern web engineering to keep my work current and adaptable.

highlights: Contributed to internal product development using Flutter for interface work and C# for backend logic.
Worked with SQL Server to support data persistence, querying, and application-side integrations.
Collaborated around API-driven workflows and practical enterprise engineering constraints.

education.description: Focused on analytics engineering, AI foundations, data warehousing, decision systems, and scalable software problem-solving.
Built strong fundamentals in software development, algorithms, databases, systems thinking, and practical implementation.

contact.summary: I’m available for internships, freelance collaboration, technical partnerships, and ambitious product discussions around AI, analytics, and software engineering.
